TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Malaloong ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 137 buwan, 342 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 310 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 32 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 68%, Paywan 1%, Rukay 1%, Kebalan 18%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Malaloong hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Malaloong hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Malaloong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Malaloong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Malaloong hya' ga Paterungan. tay mkyahu' na Malaloong hya' ga Tingalaw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ malalooŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, rukaj *%, keβalan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa pateruŋan. taj mkjaħuʔ na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tiŋalaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Malaloong ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 137 buwan, 342 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 310 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 32 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 68%, Paywan 1%, Rukay 1%, Kebalan 18%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Malaloong hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Malaloong hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Malaloong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Malaloong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Malaloong hya' ga Paterungan. tay mkyahu' na Malaloong hya' ga Tingalaw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ malalooŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, rukaj *%, keβalan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa pateruŋan. taj mkjaħuʔ na malalooŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tiŋalaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
